":["bzz-raw://bb928daeb06671d246e314eb6e94e986789035d2eb2ef47c5ba3ab106a6c2355","dweb:/ipfs/QmT9NmMKDZwwapXJhsXxmy7mT9GvnheCCxYuWhBjnqXfRn"]},"src/ArcanaPositionManager.sol":{"keccak256":"0x5ddfcfb96549a620a1ef311063eaae3059e39584273aec0d0425ceb35acc9bd6","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://3eed81862309522b508a4e4e8e51a04b926b7faa0540f362b5e823ed42afa345","dweb:/ipfs/Qme4g2HdXiWMU6LP7SduLD1JXdbUrJhPDg4rQ8k38Gmzdv"]}},"version":1}

params.positionId: The ID of the position to close.

returns.pnl: Realized PnL in USDC (6 decimals, can be negative).

params.collateral: USDC margin amount transferred FROM vault (6 decimals).
params.vault: The vault address that owns this position.

returns._0: positionId  The newly assigned position ID.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

addLiquidity(uint256).notice: Add liquidity to the engine's insurance/counterparty fund.         In production this is funded by protocol fees and LP deposits.

applyFunding(uint256).notice: Apply funding rate accrual to a position. Public so it can be called periodically.

closePosition(uint256).notice: Close an open position and settle PnL back to the vault.

getUnrealizedPnL(uint256).notice: Calculate unrealized PnL for an open position.         Formula: priceDelta(8dec) * size(6dec) / entryPrice(8dec) = result(6dec)

getVaultOpenPositions(address).notice: Returns all currently open position IDs for a vault.

isLiquidatable(uint256).notice: Returns true if position losses exceed 80% of collateral.

liquidate(uint256).notice: Liquidate an unhealthy position. Anyone may call this.         The liquidator receives a 5% bonus from the remaining collateral.
